channel.title: continuity on Mohammad Aziz
channel.description: Recent content in continuity on Mohammad Aziz

item.title: One Step At a Time on Your Personal Projects
item.description: Build Tools for Daily Live I feel stuck on the personal projects that I work on. I can say with some confident that at some point you will feel or have felt the same. It just all starts with adrenaline rush which doesn’t last longer. It is very important that the projects you build excites you. Otherwise you will abandon it and feel guilty again! One way to keep the provocation going on is create what you need right now.
